name: synthetic spring elastic potential energy extraction

questionPaper.title: Synthetic GCSE Physics Question Paper
lines: When a gymnast lands on the floor, one of the springs compresses by 1.2 cm.
Calculate the elastic potential energy stored in the spring.
Use the equation E_e = 1/2 k e^2.

answerChainMustIncludeConcepts: convert extension or compression to metres
substitute spring constant and extension or compression
give joule or J as the unit
